about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Ease Travel Tourism Company
about.description: Ease Travel is an Egyptian tourism company delivering unforgettable travel experiences — Hajj & Umrah packages from Egypt, domestic tours (Sharm El Sheikh, Hurghada, Luxor & Aswan, Marsa Matrouh), and international trips (Istanbul, Dubai, Europe). We also offer flight & hotel booking, visa processing, and embassy appointment services at competitive prices.
about.missionText: To deliver an unforgettable travel experience for every customer — from planning to return — with attention to the finest details to ensure a comfortable, enjoyable, and affordable trip.
about.visionText: To be the leading tourism company in Egypt, contributing to the promotion of Egyptian tourism at the regional and international levels.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you anytime
contact.name: Name

tours.title: All Tours
tours.subtitle: Discover Egypt & Beyond
tours.introTitle: Your Gateway to Unforgettable Tours Across Egypt & Beyond
tours.introText: Sharm El Sheikh. Hurghada. Luxor & Aswan. Marsa Matrouh. Dahab. These are just a few of the destinations we cover. Our trips range from beachside getaways on the Red Sea coast to cultural deep dives through ancient temples and bazaars. Planning something spiritual? We offer Hajj & Umrah packages from Cairo and other cities. Want to go international? Check out our itineraries to Istanbul, Dubai, and across Europe. Each program is built by local experts who live and breathe Egyptian travel. That means real experiences, smooth logistics, and honest pricing.
tours.whyItem1: Licensed local guides with deep cultural knowledge
tours.whyItem2: Private itineraries built around your schedule and budget
tours.whyItem3: Small groups capped at 15 people for a personal touch
tours.whyItem4: Clear pricing, no hidden fees, best-value guarantee
tours.browseCta: See all trips below. Or message us on WhatsApp for a custom itinerary.
tours.faq1q: How do I book a tour?
tours.faq1a: Pick a trip, click Book Now, and fill in your details. You can also reach us on WhatsApp for instant booking.
tours.faq2a: Yes. Every trip can be tailored to your group size, dates, and preferences. Just let us know what you need.
tours.faq3q: What payment methods do you accept?
tours.faq3a: We accept cash, bank transfers, and Vodafone Cash. A deposit secures your spot, with the balance due before departure.
tours.faq4a: Absolutely. Our guides are fluent in Arabic and English. Other languages can be arranged on request.
tours.noTrips: No trips available at the moment
